steps.title: Identify the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: Betelgeuse became 40% brighter; its ranking rose from 10th to 7th. The key signal is that these two events are causally linked—the first produced the second.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”In turn” expresses consequence—it shows that the brightness increase directly caused the ranking to rise. The other three options either summarize, clarify, or exemplify rather than showing direct cause-and-effect. That matches choice B — B is correct.
